name: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H AC DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.0 - Gigabit LAN - Wi-Fi 802.11ac - BT 4.2
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H AC DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Entry-level ATX motherboard with B760 chipset, DDR4 support, and Wi-Fi 802.11ac.
